name: getFile
description:
Save text or binary content to a persistent file and return a public URL. Supports subdirectory paths in the filename to maintain project structure, e.g. 'src/components/Button.js' — directories are created automatically. Use this to persist any generated artifact: source code, reports, markdown, JSON, or binary. Returns the relative path and public URL for later reference or bundling.
requirements:
- for binary content: set encoding to 'base64' and pass base64-encoded content
- for overwriting: set overwrite: true and provide an explicit filename

content.description: File content to write. For source code files this MUST be raw, valid source code only — never include explanations, planning text, error messages, or prose. Plain text by default; base64-encoded binary when encoding is 'base64'.

filename.description: Desired filename including optional subdirectory path and extension, e.g. 'src/main.js' or 'docs/report.md'. Subdirectories are created automatically. A unique name is generated when omitted.

encoding.description: Content encoding. 'text' (default) writes UTF-8 text; 'base64' decodes the content as binary before writing.

contentType.description: MIME type hint used to determine file extension when filename is omitted, e.g. 'text/markdown', 'application/json'.

overwrite.description: If true and filename is provided, overwrite the file at that exact path if it already exists. Defaults to false (a unique name is generated to avoid collisions).
